seo.title: Parsons Pest Management Store | Dallas Pest Control Experts
seo.description: Professional pest control in Dallas, TX. Serving homes and businesses with eco-friendly solutions. Call (469) 529-0860 for a free quote.

hero.headline: Protecting Your Home & Family from Pests
hero.subheadline: Expert pest control services in Dallas, TX. Safe, effective, and affordable solutions for termites, rodents, and more.

featureSections.title: Safe for Your Family, Tough on Pests
featureSections.body: We use environmentally responsible products that effectively eliminate pests without harming your loved ones or pets. Our treatments are EPA-approved and applied by certified technicians.
featureSections.cardBody: Every treatment comes with a 100% satisfaction guarantee. If pests return, we return at no extra cost.

featureSections.title: Tailored to Your Property
featureSections.body: No two infestations are alike. We assess your home or business and create a targeted treatment plan that addresses your specific pest problem, budget, and schedule.
featureSections.cardBody: Schedule your free inspection today and receive a detailed plan with no obligation.

whyChooseUs.title: Local Expertise
whyChooseUs.description: We know Dallas pests inside and out. From fire ants to German cockroaches, our treatments are tailored to the local climate.

whyChooseUs.title: Licensed & Insured
whyChooseUs.description: Our team is fully licensed, insured, and trained in the latest pest control techniques and safety protocols.

whyChooseUs.title: Fast Response
whyChooseUs.description: We offer same-day service for urgent infestations. Call us and we'll be there quickly to resolve your pest problem.

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: No hidden fees or surprise charges. We provide upfront pricing and explain every step before starting work.

testimonials.quote: Parsons Pest took care of our termite problem quickly and professionally. The technician was thorough and explained everything.
testimonials.author: James R.

testimonials.quote: We've been using Parsons for quarterly pest control for two years. Our home has never been pest-free. Highly recommend!
testimonials.author: Maria L.

testimonials.quote: They removed a large wasp nest from our backyard. The team was friendly, efficient, and the price was fair.
testimonials.author: David K.

cta.headline: Ready to Reclaim Your Home?
cta.subheadline: Contact us today for a free estimate and let our experts handle the rest.

servicesPage.intro: Parsons Pest Management Store offers comprehensive pest control services in Dallas, TX. Whether you need one-time removal or ongoing prevention, our certified technicians deliver effective, safe solutions. Explore our services below.

services.title: General Pest Control
services.shortDescription: Ongoing protection against common household pests.
services.longDescription: Our general pest control service targets ants, spiders, cockroaches, silverfish, and more. We provide quarterly treatments with exterior barrier sprays, interior spot treatments, and regular monitoring to keep your home pest-free year-round.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We inspect your property to identify pest entry points and nesting areas.

process.title: Treatment
process.description: We apply targeted treatments inside and outside your home.

process.title: Follow-up
process.description: We return quarterly to reapply and adjust as needed.

faqs.question: How often should I get pest control?
faqs.answer: We recommend quarterly treatments for optimal prevention. However, we can customize a schedule based on your needs.

faqs.question: Are your products safe for pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use pet-safe products and advise keeping pets away during application. Our technicians will provide specific instructions.

services.title: Termite Control
services.shortDescription: Protect your home from costly termite damage.
services.longDescription: Termites can cause thousands in damage before you notice them. Our termite control includes thorough inspections, liquid soil treatments, bait systems, and wood treatments to eliminate colonies and prevent future attacks. We offer both one-time and annual plans.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We conduct a detailed inspection using moisture meters and probes.

process.title: Treatment
process.description: We apply a liquid barrier or install bait stations around your foundation.

process.title: Monitoring
process.description: We monitor bait stations regularly and retreat if activity is detected.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have termites?
faqs.answer: Signs include mud tubes, hollow-sounding wood, and discarded wings. We offer free inspections to confirm.

faqs.question: How long does termite treatment last?
faqs.answer: Liquid treatments can last up to 5 years; bait systems require ongoing monitoring. We'll recommend the best option for your home.

services.title: Rodent Control
services.shortDescription: Keep rats and mice out of your home.
services.longDescription: Rodents pose health risks and cause structural damage. Our rodent control services include sealing entry points, trapping, and exclusion techniques. We use tamper-resistant bait stations and provide follow-up visits to ensure complete removal.

process.title: Assessment
process.description: We identify rodent signs and entry points around your property.

process.title: Exclusion
process.description: We seal gaps and holes to prevent future access.

process.title: Removal
process.description: We set traps and bait stations, then monitor and remove rodents.

faqs.question: Are rodent baits dangerous to pets?
faqs.answer: We use tamper-resistant bait stations that prevent pet access. We also offer snap traps as an alternative.

faqs.question: How many visits are needed?
faqs.answer: Most rodent jobs require 2-3 visits over two weeks to ensure full removal and exclusion.

services.title: Bed Bug Treatment
services.longDescription: Bed bugs are notoriously difficult to remove. Our bed bug treatment combines heat treatment, chemical sprays, and steam to kill bugs at all life stages. We also provide prep guidance and follow-up inspections to confirm eradication.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We use K-9 or visual inspections to locate all infested areas.

process.title: Treatment
process.description: We apply heat (120°F+) and/or EPA-approved chemicals.

process.title: Verification
process.description: We return after two weeks to confirm no signs of bed bugs.

faqs.question: Do I need to throw away my furniture?
faqs.answer: No, our treatments can salvage most furniture. We treat mattresses, box springs, and upholstery.

faqs.question: How many treatments are needed?
faqs.answer: Most cases require 1-2 treatments. We provide a guarantee with follow-up if needed.

about.headline: Your Local Dallas Pest Control Experts
about.mission: To provide safe, effective, and affordable pest control that protects the health and property of our Dallas community.
story: Parsons Pest Management Store was founded in 1998 by John Parsons, a Dallas native who saw a need for reliable, honest pest control in his neighborhood. Starting with a single truck and a commitment to customer service, John built a business based on trust and results. Over the years, we've grown into a team of certified technicians serving thousands of homes and businesses across the Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex.

Today, we remain family-owned and locally operated. Every technician undergoes rigorous training and uses the latest industry techniques. We believe in treating every customer like a neighbor — with respect, transparency, and a dedication to getting the job done right. Our goal is simple: keep your home pest-free and give you peace of mind.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We do what we say, and we stand behind our work with a satisfaction guarantee.

coreValues.title: Excellence
coreValues.description: We invest in ongoing training and top-quality products to deliver the best results.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We're proud to support local Dallas charities and events.

coreValues.title: Innovation
coreValues.description: We adopt eco-friendly methods and advanced technology to stay ahead of pests.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Ready to solve your pest problem? Call or fill out our form for a free quote.
